page.content: This report presents a detailed analysis of the comparative effects of various methanolic extracts on different cell lines, specifically focusing on the MCF-7, HeLa, and Chang liver cell lines as outlined in the accompanying data table. The findings are contextualized within the framework of the Yuman–Takic, Aztecan–Shoshone, and WMono–Eudeve/Òpata scenarios, which serve to highlight the diverse biological responses elicited by the extracts at concentrations of 27.5 a and 56.4 a.

lines.text: This report presents a detailed analysis of the comparative effects of various methanolic extracts on different cell lines,
specifically focusing on the MCF-7, HeLa, and Chang liver cell lines as outlined in the accompanying data table. The findings
are contextualized within the framework of the Yuman–Takic, Aztecan–Shoshone, and WMono–Eudeve/Òpata scenarios, which
serve to highlight the diverse biological responses elicited by the extracts at concentrations of 27.5 a and 56.4 a.

page.content: Notably, the table includes critical metrics such as the “Identities” and “Score (Bits),” which provide insights into the alignment quality and similarity between the extracted compounds and known biological markers.

page.content: By examining the interactions and effects across the selected cell lines, this analysis aims to contribute to the broader understanding of the biological impacts of these extracts, thereby informing future research directions and potential therapeutic applications.
